name: RPlog_Nothin_but_a_family_thing
title: Nothin' but a Family Thing
summary: At the Red Sky, the doctor Lynae oversees a cargo delivery when the newly promoted Grand Admiral Axel arrives in civilian clothes for a private, family visit. Over a cigarette, the two -- bound as family and as godfather to her son Andrev -- frankly discuss her retirement from service, her wish that Axel would leave Tyler's Imperium, and Axel's reasoning that he is playing a long game to walk away rich when the Imperium inevitably falls. They negotiate Andrev's future, agreeing he will serve and learn under Axel aboard a Star Destroyer rather than be hidden with estranged relatives. Sharing their mutual resolve to end the bloody nonsense of Force users, the normally reserved pair exchange a rare, genuine hug and vows to keep each other and the boy safe.
